mapper.insert: INSERT INTO team_member (team_id, user_id, portrait_photo, role, status) VALUES (#{teamId}, #{userId}, #{portraitPhoto}, #{role}, #{status})
mapper.update: UPDATE team_member SET status = #{status} WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE team_member SET portrait_photo = #{portraitPhoto} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM team_member WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND status != 3
